rules.title: Mechanical Seal Inspection Frequency
rules.requirement: All rotating equipment with mechanical seals handling hazardous fluids shall undergo seal inspection during every planned turnaround or at intervals not exceeding 24 months
rules.verification_method: Check that seal inspections are documented within 24-month intervals for all applicable equipment

rules.title: Pressure Vessel Wall Thickness Trending
rules.requirement: Thickness measurements on pressure vessels shall be documented and trended. Any wall loss exceeding 10% of nominal thickness requires engineering assessment within 30 days
rules.verification_method: Verify that all thickness survey findings exceeding 10% wall loss have corresponding engineering assessments or corrective work orders within 30 days

rules.title: LOTO Zero Energy Verification
rules.requirement: Lockout-Tagout procedures shall include verification of zero energy state by attempting equipment startup before maintenance commences
rules.verification_method: Review LOTO procedures to confirm they include a step for attempting startup to verify zero energy state

rules.title: Annual Pressure Vessel Examination
rules.requirement: Pressure vessels and equipment shall be examined by a competent person at least once every 12 months, with records maintained for inspection
rules.verification_method: Verify inspection records exist for all pressure-containing equipment within the past 12 months

rules.title: Hot Work Fire Watch Duration
rules.requirement: All hot work permits shall specify fire watch requirements and duration, with minimum 30-minute fire watch after completion of hot work
rules.verification_method: Review hot work procedures and permits to confirm 30-minute post-work fire watch is specified

rules.title: Approved Lubricants for Rotating Equipment
rules.requirement: Lubricants and chemicals used in rotating equipment shall be approved for the service conditions and documented in equipment records
rules.verification_method: Verify that only approved lubricants are referenced in maintenance records for rotating equipment

rules.title: Pressure Vessel Fitness Certificate
rules.requirement: Every pressure vessel shall display a valid fitness certificate issued by authorized inspector with validity not exceeding 2 years
rules.verification_method: Verify fitness certificates are current and within validity period for all pressure vessels

rules.title: Hazardous Area Equipment Certification
rules.requirement: Equipment installed in Zone 1 or Zone 2 areas shall be certified for the appropriate hazardous area classification
rules.verification_method: Verify hazardous area certification documentation exists for equipment in classified zones

rules.title: Recurring Failure Root Cause Analysis
rules.requirement: Equipment experiencing more than 3 similar failures within 18 months shall undergo formal Root Cause Analysis (RCA) with documented corrective actions
rules.verification_method: Identify equipment with recurring failures and verify RCA documentation exists

rules.title: Timely Remediation of Inspection Findings
rules.requirement: Critical inspection findings shall have corrective actions initiated within 7 days and completed within the timeframe specified in the engineering assessment
rules.verification_method: Cross-reference inspection findings with work orders to verify timely corrective action
